purpose: V_pairrank lever architectural module spec — fine-tune 차원 외 dedicated retrieval head. raw#12 frozen 2026-04-25. 본 spec은 architecture detail; 실 구현 + LoRA 통합은 S5 forward cycle.
rationale: V_pairrank base model invariant FAIL (Qwen3 BASE/TRAINED + Qwen2.5 SMOKE 모두 top3 hit 0%, r4 partial 16.7%만 예외). transformer attention의 architectural 한계 — paired retrieval geometry 학습 안 됨. dedicated retrieval head로 해결 시도.

input.D: hidden_dim of base model (e.g., 4096 for Qwen3-8B)

layers.name: Output
layers.computation: pair_score[b, i, j] = cos(layer2_out[b, i], layer2_out[b, j]) / temperature

training_loss_component.name: L_contrastive_pair
training_loss_component.formula: For each (i,j) in PAIRS: sim_pos = pair_score[i,j], sim_neg_k = pair_score[i,k] for k not in PAIRS. L_pair_ij = -log(exp(sim_pos/τ) / (exp(sim_pos/τ) + Σ_k exp(sim_neg_k/τ))). L_contrastive_pair = mean over PAIRS of L_pair_ij.

inference_protocol.step_3: For V_pairrank evaluation: rank j among (k != i) by pair_score[i, k] descending; compute pair_rank for each (i, j) in PAIRS
inference_protocol.step_4: V_pairrank = mean(1/pair_rank); top1_hit, top3_hit per existing tool/an11_b_v_pairrank.hexa metric

ablation_required_post_S5: Retrieval head 단독 (LoRA 없음) — baseline V_pairrank 측정
LoRA 단독 (retrieval head 없음) — 기존 LoRA path 재현
LoRA + retrieval head 통합 — 두 lever interaction 측정
Retrieval head freeze (LoRA만 train) — head가 학습되지 않은 상태에서 LoRA contribution
raw10_honest_scope: 본 spec은 architecture detail. 실 구현 (transformer 통합, gradient flow, retrieval head와 LoRA 동시 training stability) 검증은 S5 forward cycle.
param count 0.06%는 minimal but architectural change은 base model output distribution에 영향 가능 — V0/V1/V2/V3 측정에 미치는 영향 ablation 필요
L_contrastive_pair과 L_PAPO_top_3 사이 gradient interference 가능 (둘 다 paired structure 영향)

raw_compliance.raw_10_no_overclaim: satisfied — gradient interference, output distribution shift, ablation requirement 모두 명시
raw_compliance.raw_12_cherry_pick_proof: satisfied — module arch + temperature + lambda 모두 frozen, sweep grid 사전 등록
raw_compliance.raw_15_ssot: this file = SSOT for retrieval head spec
raw_compliance.raw_37_38_omega_saturation_cycle: design (V_pairrank arch lever requirement) → impl (this spec) → fixpoint
